Glossary

Alphabetical index of security terms covered in this catalog.

A C D G H K L M N P R S Z

A

Abusing Entra ID Application Permissions
High severity cloud & identity federation technique targeting Entra ID, Microsoft 365, Cloud applications.
AdminSDHolder Modification
Critical severity ad infrastructure technique targeting Active Directory, Protected Groups.
AS-REP Roasting
High severity kerberos / ad authentication technique targeting Active Directory, User Accounts.

C

ChatGPT Prompt Injection
High severity emerging threats technique targeting AI systems, LLM-powered applications.
Credential Stuffing
Medium severity credential theft & password technique targeting Web applications, Cloud services.

D

DCShadow
Critical severity identity and directory services technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers.
DCSync
Critical severity identity and directory services technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers.

G

gMSA Exploitation
High severity credential theft & password technique targeting Active Directory, Service Accounts.
Golden SAML
Critical severity cloud & identity federation technique targeting AD FS, Cloud Apps, O365.
Golden Ticket
Critical severity kerberos / ad authentication technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers.

H

Hafnium Cyber
Critical severity ad infrastructure technique targeting Exchange Server, Active Directory.

K

Kerberoasting
High severity kerberos / ad authentication technique targeting Active Directory, Service Accounts.

L

Lateral Movement
Critical severity post-exploitation technique targeting All network resources.
LDAP Reconnaissance
Low-Medium severity reconnaissance technique targeting Active Directory, LDAP.

M

Malware Attacks
High severity malware & ransomware technique targeting All endpoints.
Man-in-the-Middle
Critical severity network & communication technique targeting Networks, Endpoints, Cloud services.
Mousejacking
High severity network & communication technique targeting Wireless peripherals, Workstations.

N

NTDS.dit Password Extraction
Critical severity credential theft & password technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers.

P

Pass-the-Cookie
High severity cloud & identity federation technique targeting Cloud services, Browsers.
Pass-the-Hash
High severity credential theft & lateral movement technique targeting NTLM Windows Endpoints, Active Directory.
Pass-the-Ticket
High severity kerberos / ad authentication technique targeting Active Directory, Windows Endpoints.
Password
Medium severity credential theft & password technique targeting All authentication systems.
Password Spraying
Medium severity credential theft & password technique targeting Active Directory, Cloud Services, VPN.
Plaintext Password Extraction
High severity credential theft & password technique targeting Active Directory, Group Policy.
PowerShell Attacks
High severity post-exploitation technique targeting Windows endpoints.

R

Rainbow Table
High severity credential theft & password technique targeting Legacy hash systems, NTLM.
Ransomware
Critical severity malware & ransomware technique targeting All endpoints, Active Directory, Backups.

S

Security Support Provider
Critical severity credential theft & password technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers, LSASS.
Service Account Attacks
High severity post-exploitation technique targeting Active Directory, Service Accounts.
Silver Ticket
High severity kerberos / ad authentication technique targeting Active Directory, Service Accounts.
Skeleton Key
Critical severity ad infrastructure technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers.
SQL Injection / PowerUpSQL
High severity web application & injection technique targeting SQL Server, Databases.

Z

Zerologon
Critical severity ad infrastructure technique targeting Active Directory, Domain Controllers.
Built from Netwrix's 33-article attack catalog.
